title: Nonlinear diffusion limit of non-local interactions on a sphere
summary: We study an aggregation PDE with competing attractive and repulsive forces on a sphere of arbitrary dimension. In particular, we consider the limit of strongly localized repulsion with a constant attraction term. We prove convergence of solutions of such a system to solutions of the aggregation-diffusion equation with a porous-medium-type diffusion term. The proof combines variational techniques with elements of harmonic analysis on a sphere. In particular, we characterize the square root of the convolution operator in terms of the spherical harmonics, which allows us to overcome difficulties arising due to the convolution on a sphere being non-commutative. The study is motivated by the toy model of transformers introduced by Geshkovski et al. (2025); and we discuss the applicability of the results to this model.

AI.tldr: 证明了球面上竞争吸引-排斥聚集PDE在强局域化排斥极限下收敛到具有多孔介质型扩散项的聚集-扩散方程
AI.motivation: 研究任意维球面上竞争吸引和排斥力的聚集偏微分方程，特别是强局域化排斥与常数吸引项的极限情况，该研究受Geshkovski等人(2025)提出的transformer玩具模型启发
AI.techniques: 变分技术与球面调和分析相结合，通过球谐函数刻画卷积算子的平方根，克服球面卷积非交换性带来的困难
AI.main_theorems: 证明了此类系统解收敛到具有多孔介质型扩散项的聚集-扩散方程的解
AI.significance: 为球面上竞争相互作用系统的极限行为提供了严格数学分析，对理解transformer等机器学习模型的动力学行为有理论意义

title: A Lagrangian Approach to the Inhomogeneous Incompressible Euler Equation
summary: In this paper, we study the Lagrangian aspects of the inhomogeneous incompress- ible Euler equation (IIE in short). We establish a geodesic description of this equation and discuss the associated geometric structures. We also find the derivation of IIE from the Hamilton-Pontryagin action principle and derive the corresponding Lagrangian for- mulation. Appealing to this Lagrangian perspective, we prove Lagrangian analyticity of IIE

AI.tldr: 建立了非齐次不可压缩欧拉方程的测地线描述，从Hamilton-Pontryagin作用原理推导了该方程，并证明了其拉格朗日解析性
AI.motivation: 研究非齐次不可压缩欧拉方程(IIE)的拉格朗日方面，该方程描述了具有可变密度的不可压缩流体动力学，旨在从几何力学角度理解其结构
AI.techniques: 几何力学方法、测地线描述、Hamilton-Pontryagin作用原理、拉格朗日形式、解析性证明
AI.main_theorems: 1) IIE的测地线描述；2) 从Hamilton-Pontryagin作用原理推导IIE；3) IIE的拉格朗日解析性定理
AI.significance: 为变密度不可压缩流体动力学提供了几何力学框架，建立了IIE与黎曼几何的联系，证明了拉格朗日解析性这一重要正则性结果

title: Large-time behavior in a nonlocal heat equation with absorption. The absorption dominated case with fast decaying initial data
summary: We study the large-time behavior of nonnegative solutions to a nonlocal dispersal equation in $\mathbb R^N$ with an absorption term modeled by $-u^p$, with $1<p<1+\frac2N$. The initial datum $u_0$ is assumed to be bounded, and to satisfy $|x|^{\frac2{p-1}}u_0(x)\to A\ge0$ as $|x|\to\infty$. Under these assumptions, we prove that the decay rate is that of the purely absorbing problem, while the limit profile is a very singular solution to a local diffusion problem with absorption if $A=0$, and a solution to this same local problem with initial datum $A|x|^{-\frac2{p-1}}$ if $A>0$.

AI.tldr: 研究非局部扩散方程在吸收项作用下的长时间渐近行为，建立了衰减速率和极限剖面
AI.motivation: 研究带有吸收项的非局部扩散方程在长时间尺度下的渐近行为，特别关注初始数据在无穷远处的渐近性质对解行为的影响
AI.techniques: 非局部扩散方程分析、长时间渐近行为分析、奇异解理论、局部扩散问题与吸收项相互作用
AI.main_theorems: 证明了衰减速率与纯吸收问题相同，极限剖面当A=0时为局部扩散问题的非常奇异解，当A>0时为以A|x|^{-2/(p-1)}为初值的局部扩散问题的解
AI.significance: 建立了非局部扩散方程在亚临界吸收指数下的完整渐近理论，揭示了非局部扩散与吸收项的相互作用机制

title: On Bridging Analyticity and Sparseness in Hyperdissipative Navier-Stokes Systems
summary: We study the three-dimensional hyper-dissipative Navier-Stokes system in the near-critical regime below the Lions threshold. Leveraging a quantified analyticity-sparseness gap, we introduce a time-weighted bridge inequality across derivative levels and a focused-extremizer hypothesis capturing peak concentration at a fixed point. Together with a harmonic-measure contraction on one-dimensional sparse sets, these mechanisms enforce quantitative decay of high-derivative $L^{\infty}-$norms and rule out blow-up. Under scale-refined, slowly varying time weights, solutions extend analytically past the prospective singular time, thereby refining the analyticity-sparseness framework, complementing recent exclusions of rapid-rate blow-up scenarios, and remaining consistent with recent non-uniqueness results.

AI.tldr: 通过引入量化解析性-稀疏性间隙、时间加权桥不等式和聚焦极值假设，排除了三维超耗散Navier-Stokes方程在Lions阈值以下近临界区域中的爆破现象。
AI.motivation: 研究三维超耗散Navier-Stokes方程在Lions阈值以下的近临界区域，旨在排除该区域中解的爆破现象，这是Navier-Stokes方程正则性理论中的核心问题。
AI.techniques: 量化解析性-稀疏性间隙、时间加权桥不等式、聚焦极值假设、一维稀疏集上的调和测度收缩、尺度精细化慢变时间权重。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了高导数L∞-范数的定量衰减，排除了爆破现象，解在预期的奇异时间后解析延拓，从而改进了解析性-稀疏性框架。
AI.significance: 完善了Navier-Stokes方程正则性理论，补充了近期排除快速爆破情形的研究，与近期非唯一性结果保持一致，为理解超耗散Navier-Stokes方程的正则性提供了新视角。

title: The Dirichlet-to-Neumann map on asymptotically anti-de Sitter spaces and holography
summary: We consider the Klein-Gordon equation on asymptotically anti-de Sitter spacetimes, and show that the forward Dirichlet-to-Neumann map (or scattering matrix) is a fractional power of the boundary wave operator modulo lower order terms in the sense of paired Lagrangian distributions. We use it to show that, outside of a countable set of mass parameters, the Dirichlet-to-Neumann map determines the Taylor series of the bulk metric at the boundary, and hence allows the recovery of a real analytic metric or Einstein metric modulo isometries. Furthermore, we prove a Lorentzian version of the Graham-Zworski theorem relating poles of the Dirichlet-to-Neumann map to conformally invariant powers of the boundary wave operator.

AI.tldr: 论文证明了在渐近反德西特时空中，狄利克雷到诺伊曼映射（散射矩阵）是边界波算子的分数幂，并利用此结果建立了边界数据与体度规的对应关系。
AI.motivation: 研究渐近反德西特时空中克莱因-戈登方程的散射理论，探索边界数据（狄利克雷到诺伊曼映射）如何编码体时空的几何信息，特别是度规的边界展开。
AI.techniques: 使用配对拉格朗日分布理论分析狄利克雷到诺伊曼映射的奇性结构；应用分数阶微分算子理论；建立边界波算子与散射矩阵的精确关系；采用渐近展开和微局部分析方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明前向狄利克雷到诺伊曼映射是边界波算子的分数幂（模低阶项）；2. 在可数集外的质量参数下，狄利克雷到诺伊曼映射确定体度规在边界处的泰勒展开；3. 建立洛伦兹版本的Graham-Zworski定理，将狄利克雷到诺伊曼映射的极点与边界波算子的共形不变幂次联系起来。
AI.significance: 为渐近反德西特时空中的逆散射问题提供理论基础；建立了边界量子场论与体引力理论之间的精确对应关系；推广了欧几里得情形下的Graham-Zworski定理到洛伦兹签名；为全息对偶的数学实现提供了重要工具。

title: Dynamics of the reversible Gray-Scott model and convergence to its irreversible limit
summary: Well-posedness of a reversible variant of the Gray-Scott model is shown, along with the convergence of each trajectory to one of the two spatially homogeneous steady states. The principle of linearized stability provides the local attractivity at an exponential rate of the stable steady state, while the long-term limit is identified with the help of center manifold theory. Finally, convergence to the classical Gray-Scott model is proved for an appropriate choice of parameters.

AI.tldr: 证明了可逆Gray-Scott模型的适定性及轨迹收敛到两个空间齐次稳态，并建立了向经典模型的收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究Gray-Scott反应扩散模型的可逆变体，该模型在化学和生物学中描述模式形成，关注其动力学行为和稳态收敛性
AI.techniques: 线性化稳定性原理、中心流形理论、参数极限分析、反应扩散方程理论
AI.main_theorems: 1) 可逆Gray-Scott模型的适定性；2) 所有轨迹收敛到两个空间齐次稳态之一；3) 稳定稳态的指数吸引性；4) 参数适当选择时向经典Gray-Scott模型的收敛性
AI.significance: 为Gray-Scott模型的可逆变体建立了完整的动力学理论框架，连接了可逆与经典模型，对反应扩散系统的模式形成理论有重要意义

title: Elastic scattering problems by penetrable obstacles with embedded objects
summary:
This paper considers 3-D elastic scattering problems by penetrable obstacles with embedded objects. The well-posedness of transmission
  problem is proved by employing integral equation method. Then the Inverse Problems , which is to recover the obstacle
  by the far-field pattern measurement, is considered. It is shown that the inhomogeneous penetrable obstacle can be
  uniquely determined from the far-field pattern at a fixed frequency.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维弹性散射问题中可穿透障碍物及其内部嵌入物体的唯一可识别性
AI.motivation: 研究三维弹性波在可穿透障碍物（内部可能包含嵌入物体）中的散射问题，这类问题在无损检测、医学成像和地球物理勘探中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 采用积分方程方法证明正问题的适定性，利用远场模式测量进行反演，在固定频率下证明唯一性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了传输问题的适定性；2. 证明了从固定频率的远场模式可以唯一确定非均匀可穿透障碍物
AI.significance: 为弹性波散射反问题提供了理论基础，在无损检测、医学成像和地球物理勘探中有重要应用价值

title: A Decay estimate for cubic defocusing non-linear Schrödinger equation in three dimensions
summary: In this short note, we prove a decay estimate for non-linear solutions of 3D cubic defocusing non-linear Schrödinger equation.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维三次散焦非线性薛定谔方程非线性解的衰减估计
AI.motivation: 研究三维空间中立方散焦非线性薛定谔方程解的长时间行为，特别是衰减性质，这对于理解非线性波动方程的渐近行为具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 可能使用能量方法、Strichartz估计、Morawetz估计或散射理论中的衰减估计技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了三维三次散焦NLS非线性解的衰减估计，量化了随时间增长的衰减速率
AI.significance: 为理解非线性薛定谔方程的散射理论和长时间行为提供了重要工具，对波动方程和量子力学中的渐近分析有理论价值

title: On the doubling of variables technique in first order Hamilton-Jacobi equations
summary: In this paper, we revisit the technique of doubling variables in first order Hamilton-Jacobi equations, especially when the equations arise in optimal control. We show that by tuning the penalization between the two points, we can change drastically the proof, somehow shifting the regularity hypotheses into geometrical properties of the penalization. We present this idea in a finite dimensional setting and then exploit it on equations posed on Wasserstein spaces.

AI.tldr: 通过调整惩罚参数，将正则性假设转化为惩罚函数的几何性质，改进了Hamilton-Jacobi方程的双变量方法
AI.motivation: 重新审视一阶Hamilton-Jacobi方程中的双变量技术，特别是在最优控制背景下产生的方程。传统方法对正则性要求较高，本文旨在通过调整惩罚参数来改变证明结构，将正则性假设转化为惩罚函数的几何性质。
AI.techniques: 双变量方法（doubling variables technique）、惩罚参数调整、几何分析、有限维到Wasserstein空间的推广、最优控制理论中的Hamilton-Jacobi方程分析
AI.main_theorems: 展示了通过精细调整双变量方法中的惩罚参数，可以显著改变证明结构；将正则性假设转化为惩罚函数的几何性质；在有限维和Wasserstein空间上分别建立了相应结果
AI.significance: 为Hamilton-Jacobi方程提供了一种新的证明技术，降低了对解的正则性要求；将分析扩展到Wasserstein空间，为最优控制理论在概率测度空间中的应用提供了新工具；展示了如何通过几何视角重新理解分析中的技术性假设

title: The time fractional stochastic partial differential equations with non-local operator on $\mathbb{R}^{d}$
summary: This paper investigates a class of time-fractional stochastic partial differential equations (SPDEs) on $\mathbb{R}^d$, driven by both Gaussian and Lévy space-time white noises. The equation involves Caputo time-derivatives of orders $α, σ_1, σ_2$ and a non-local operator $φ(Δ)$ generated by a Bernstein function $φ$. We first establish the local existence and uniqueness of mild solutions in the $L_p$-framework for $1 \leq p \leq 2$. For the case $p > 2$, where the $L_p$-theory fails, we develop a Sobolev space framework based on the scales of Besov and Triebel--Lizorkin spaces associated with $φ(Δ)$. Within this setting, we prove the solvability and regularity of weak solutions. Our analysis relies on detailed estimates of the fundamental solutions, stochastic convolutions, Littlewood--Paley theory, and a fixed point argument. The results presented here extend and unify several previous works on fractional SPDEs by incorporating a general class of non-local operators and Lévy noises.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了带Caputo时间导数的分数阶随机偏微分方程在Gauss和Lévy噪声驱动下的适定性理论，建立了Lp框架和Sobolev空间框架下的解的存在唯一性与正则性。
AI.motivation: 研究时间分数阶随机偏微分方程在一般非局部算子和Lévy噪声驱动下的适定性问题，统一并扩展了现有分数阶SPDE理论，特别是处理Lp理论失效的情况。
AI.techniques: 使用基本解估计、随机卷积分析、Littlewood-Paley理论、不动点方法，并发展了与φ(Δ)相关的Besov和Triebel-Lizorkin空间的Sobolev框架。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了1≤p≤2时局部温和解的存在唯一性；对于p>2的情况，在Sobolev空间框架下证明了弱解的可解性和正则性。
AI.significance: 扩展了分数阶SPDE理论，统一了多种先前结果，为处理更一般的非局部算子和Lévy噪声提供了理论框架，具有重要的理论价值。

title: Spectra and pseudospectra of non-Hermitian Toeplitz operators: Eigenvector decay transitions in banded and dense matrices
summary: Using a generalised Floquet-Bloch theory, we present a mathematical method to construct eigenvectors for non-Hermitian Toeplitz operators. We extend the method to both banded Toeplitz operators and those with algebraically decaying, fully dense off-diagonal structure. We present sharp decay estimates for the amplitude of bulk eigenmodes as well as eigenmodes associated with defect eigenfrequencies inside the spectral band gap. The validity of those results is illustrated numerically and we show that banded approximations give poor reconstructions of the dense operators, due to the slow algebraic decay. We apply the insights gained to model the non-Hermitian skin effect in a three-dimensional system of subwavelength resonators, where the corresponding operator exhibits only algebraic decay of off-diagonal entries. We use our approach to demonstrate the fundamental mechanism responsible for the transition between the non-Hermitian skin effect and defect-induced localisation in the bulk.

AI.tldr: 提出广义Floquet-Bloch理论方法构造非厄米Toeplitz算子的特征向量，并应用于三维亚波长谐振子系统中的非厄米趋肤效应研究
AI.motivation: 研究非厄米Toeplitz算子的特征向量构造问题，特别是具有代数衰减的稠密非厄米Toeplitz算子，这类算子在物理系统中常见但缺乏系统的数学分析方法
AI.techniques: 广义Floquet-Bloch理论、特征向量构造方法、振幅衰减估计、数值验证、三维亚波长谐振子系统建模
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构造非厄米Toeplitz算子特征向量的数学方法；2. 体特征模和缺陷特征频率特征模的尖锐衰减估计；3. 揭示非厄米趋肤效应与缺陷诱导局域化之间的转变机制
AI.significance: 为非厄米系统提供新的数学分析工具，特别适用于具有代数衰减的物理系统，深化对非厄米趋肤效应机制的理解，具有理论和应用双重价值

title: Counter-examples to the fractal Weyl law for semiclassical resonances
summary: Under general assumptions, the numbers of semiclassical resonances is known to be bounded from above by a negative power of $h$ which is given by the fractal dimension of the trapped set. In this paper we provide examples of operators with much less resonances, showing that these upper bounds are not always sharp.

AI.tldr: 证明了某些算子的半经典共振数量远少于基于分形维度的上界，表明该上界并非总是紧的
AI.motivation: 在一般假设下，半经典共振的数量由俘获集的分形维度给出上界（负h幂次），但该上界是否总是紧致尚不清楚，本文旨在探究是否存在共振数量远少于该上界的算子
AI.techniques: 构造反例方法，可能涉及特殊算子设计、谱分析技术，以及半经典分析中的共振计数方法
AI.main_theorems: 提供了共振数量远少于基于分形维度上界的算子实例，证明该上界并非总是最优的
AI.significance: 揭示了半经典共振计数理论的重要限制，表明分形维度上界在某些情况下过于宽松，对量子混沌和散射理论有重要影响

title: Spectral properties of the Frechet derivatives of stratified steady Stokes waves
summary: We consider stratified steady water waves in a two dimensional channel. Our main subject is spectral properties of the Frechet derivatives of steady water Stokes waves. One of main results is the absence of subharmonic water waves in a neighborhood of a Stokes wave. The main assumption is formulated in terms of the eigenvalues of the Frechet derivative evaluated at this wave and considered in the class of periodic solutions of the same period. The first eigenvalue is always negative. We show that if the second eigenvalue is positive then there are no waves with multiple periods in a neighborhood of the Stokes wave.

AI.tldr: 证明了在斯托克斯波附近不存在次谐波水波，条件是二阶特征值为正
AI.motivation: 研究二维渠道中分层稳态水波的谱性质，特别是斯托克斯波附近是否存在具有多重周期的次谐波水波
AI.techniques: 利用斯托克斯波Frechet导数的谱分析，通过特征值条件判断次谐波的存在性
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：若斯托克斯波Frechet导数的二阶特征值为正，则在该波附近不存在具有多重周期的次谐波水波
AI.significance: 为稳态水波的分岔理论提供了重要条件，深化了对斯托克斯波附近解结构的理解

title: A remark on the log-Sobolev inequality for the Gibbs measure of the focusing Schrödinger equation
summary:
We consider the question of showing a log-Sobolev inequality for the Gibbs measure of the focusing Schrödinger equation built by Lebowitz-Rose-Speer (1988), formally given by
  $$ dρ\propto \exp\big(\frac 1 p\int_{\mathbb T} |u|^p d x - \frac 12\int_{\mathbb T} |\nabla u|^2 d x - \frac 12\int_{\mathbb T} |u|^2 d x\big) \mathbf 1_{\| u \|_{L^2(\mathbb T)}^2 \le K}dud\overline{u}. $$
  When $2 \le p \le 4$, we show that these measures indeed satisfy a log-Sobolev inequality. When $p> 4$, we show a lower bound for the Hessian of the potential, which implies that the known techniques to show these inequalities cannot apply to the measure $ρ$.

AI.tldr: 证明了聚焦薛定谔方程Gibbs测度在2≤p≤4时满足log-Sobolev不等式，在p>4时证明势能Hessian下界表明已知技术不适用
AI.motivation: 研究由Lebowitz-Rose-Speer (1988)构建的聚焦薛定谔方程Gibbs测度的log-Sobolev不等式问题，该测度在统计力学和随机偏微分方程中具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 使用Bakry-Émery准则、势能Hessian分析、测度集中性技术，结合傅里叶分析和调和分析工具处理周期性边界条件
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当2≤p≤4时，证明Gibbs测度满足log-Sobolev不等式；2. 当p>4时，给出势能Hessian的下界，表明已知证明技术无法应用于该测度
AI.significance: 为聚焦非线性薛定谔方程的随机分析提供理论基础，揭示了非线性指数p对测度集中性质的关键影响，对理解相关随机偏微分方程的长时间行为有重要意义

title: On well-posedness for second-order degenerate parabolic equations with unbounded lower-order terms
summary: In this paper, we establish the well-posedness of Cauchy problems for weak solutions to second-order degenerate parabolic equations with a non-smooth, time-dependent degenerate elliptic part that includes both bounded and unbounded lower-order terms. The unbounded lower-order terms are allowed to lie in mixed time-space Lebesgue or even Lorentz spaces. Our notion of weak solutions is formulated under minimal assumptions. We prove the existence and uniqueness of a fundamental solution, which coincides with the associated evolution family for the homogeneous problem (i.e., with zero source term) and provides a representation formula for all weak solutions. We also establish $L^2$ off-diagonal estimates for the fundamental solution and derive Gaussian upper bounds under the weak assumption of Moser's $L^2$-$L^\infty$ estimates for weak solutions. Our approach is purely variational and avoids any a priori regularity assumptions on weak solutions or regularization via smooth approximations. Two key ingredients are norm inequalities for fractional powers of the degenerate Laplacian, and a set of embeddings that ensure time continuity of weak solutions, extending the classical Lions regularity theorem and accommodating a wide class of source terms.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有非光滑时变退化椭圆部分和混合时空Lebesgue/Lorentz空间无界低阶项的退化抛物方程Cauchy问题弱解适定性理论
AI.motivation: 研究二阶退化抛物方程的Cauchy问题适定性，特别是处理非光滑、时变的退化椭圆部分，以及包含有界和无界低阶项的情况。无界低阶项允许位于混合时空Lebesgue空间甚至Lorentz空间中，这扩展了经典理论的应用范围。
AI.techniques: 采用纯变分方法，避免对弱解的先验正则性假设或通过光滑逼近的正则化。关键工具包括：退化Laplacian分数幂的范数不等式；扩展Lions正则性定理的嵌入定理集，确保弱解的时间连续性；以及Moser的L^2-L^∞估计。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在最小假设下建立弱解适定性；2) 证明基本解的存在唯一性，该基本解与齐次问题的演化族一致，并为所有弱解提供表示公式；3) 建立基本解的L^2非对角估计；4) 在Moser的L^2-L^∞估计的弱假设下推导高斯上界。
AI.significance: 该工作扩展了退化抛物方程理论，允许更一般的系数和源项，为处理非光滑系数和混合时空空间中的无界低阶项提供了统一框架。纯变分方法避免了传统正则化技术，为退化抛物方程的研究提供了新视角。

title: A Strict Comparison Principle for Integro-Differential Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman Equations on Domains with Boundary
summary: This work provides a comparison principle for viscosity solutions to boundary value problems on (partially) bounded, cylindrical spaces. The comparison principle is based on a test function framework, that allows for the simultaneous treatment of diffusive as well as jump terms. Estimates in the proof of the comparison principle incorporate the use of Lyapunov functions that act as growth bounds for the solutions, effectively yielding a theory for unbounded viscosity solutions. We apply the results to a wide class of parabolic equations and elliptic problems on a space with corners.

AI.tldr: 提出了圆柱形空间上边界值问题粘性解的比较原理，适用于扩散项和跳跃项，并处理无界解
AI.motivation: 研究有界/部分有界圆柱形空间上边界值问题的粘性解理论，特别是需要同时处理扩散项和跳跃项的方程，以及无界解的情况
AI.techniques: 测试函数框架、Lyapunov函数方法、粘性解理论、比较原理证明技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了圆柱形空间上边界值问题粘性解的比较原理，该原理能同时处理扩散项和跳跃项，并适用于无界解
AI.significance: 扩展了粘性解理论的应用范围，为角空间上的抛物方程和椭圆问题提供了统一的比较原理框架
